smb-phone.name: Frustrated small business owner
smb-phone.script: Hi, I've been getting billed twice on my business phone line and I need help figuring out what's going on.

waste.name: Office manager disputing a pickup
waste.script: Hi, I'm calling because last month's invoice has a charge for a pickup that never happened.

staffing.name: AP clerk with a questioned invoice
staffing.script: Hi, I have an invoice here that I can't match to any PO. Can you help me figure out which contractor it's for?

distribution.name: Small contractor disputing a late fee
distribution.script: I got hit with a late fee but I paid this invoice two weeks ago. Can you pull up my account?

healthcare.name: Patient confused about a bill
healthcare.script: Hi, I got a bill for a visit that should have been covered by insurance. Can you help me understand?
